Frequently questions

  • How to buy crypto?

    To purchase crypto you have to buy crypto from trusted vendors like Blockchain, cashapp, paypal, Coinmama, Crypto, Local bitcoin, lobstr.

  • How can i transfer crypto?

    Copy your desired crypto wallet from your account and transfer the desired crypto to the address provided, wait for 24 hours to get your account credited.

    • what about the investment planing?

    The plans are listed below. First plan is for 2 days and has an interest of 3%, the second plan is for 4 days and has an interest of 14%.

  • How can i get the price idea?

    That can be found in the plan listing.

  • How can i contact with you?

    Visit the contact page for details on how to reach us.

About Us

Who we are?

We're a global investment firm, we foster diverse perspectives and embrace innovation to help our clients navigate the uncertainty of capital markets.

Credible trades makes trades in more than 40 encrypted currencies in world brokers (poliniex and others) with strategies and a lot of responsibility, using high technology and advanced tools, monitored through a chart of a team of traders professional and experienced in this market, and thus have a very high profitability success.

A community founded to revolutionize the market of crypto-traders, inserted in this billionaire market, competitive and few people have access to. Miningfarm through a team of professionals trader specialists, comes with an opportunity for anyone to produce results in this digital currency market. Be our partner by investing with us and get percentage return on investment. We keep your investment safe and your profit is assured.

Read More

Why Choose Credible trades?

We at Credible trades offer you the fastest and the most legit way to successfully accumulate your BTC or Coins . Our sophisticated technology does all the hard work, making sure that every customer is 100% satisfied and that every trade goes through smoothly. We do give out loans to help our clients startup a business of their choice.

  • Join Us
  • Airdrop
  • Login
  • Loan

How it works

Credible trades Strategy is a very old but yet very effective trading strategy, especially when we have high end technology to do all the hard work for you. Our servers are running our AH-X Bots that are constantly looking for the biggest price difference between multiple cryptocurrency exchanges. When the difference is found, trades are executed on both exchanges (the one with the lowest and the one with the highest price) so in the end the profit is 100% guaranteed. You might think that it is a small price difference (meaning small / micro profit), but our Bots execute around 100 trades each minute, so the funds are generated by making a big number of successful micro transactions. Doing this manually with success is virtually impossible for a human being, so this is where Our System steps in.
